narrative:
Montpelier Ex Vill Sd (Williams) exempted village school district has 3,570 registered voters, with 57.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.2% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 8.6%, a pronounced Republican lean of 25.7 percentage points.
